text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oho? Look at this race's name! It's as if it had
been organized precisely for me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen, a G1 race set on this
sacred operatic ground—I shall make it mine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
By fair means or by foul, I will dominate the
starring role! Or at least, that's how I would have
it...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Alas, there is one more star here today.
choice_data_list: Yeah, and she's an up-and-comer at that.
Yeah, and she's an up-and-comer at that.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. For her to emerge so prominently from
the many nameless contestants is quite
remarkable.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
When first we met, I never imagined she would
become such a miraculous star.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Come, let us go speak with her before the race!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I actually made it. It's the Takurazuka Kinen...
I'm so nervous...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Can I actually run against Opera O?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Welcome to my abode, dear Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Hyeee! I'm so, so, so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I didn't mean to get in your way, Opera O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are no obstruction. Stand tall. For today, you
are... Cinderella!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Cinderella?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The one and only! The daughter of peasants has
fought well her way to the feet of this king.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What have you to be ashamed of? Today, you are
more radiant and beautiful than ever!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, dance with me! This is your invitation.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is inviting me... Ohh, it's too much an
honor.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: B-but... I'll try! I'll do the best I can!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaa ha hah! That will do!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will win in the end, regardless! What is
Cinderella to the Overlord? An insect and
nothing more!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yeeep... I knew this would be scary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto seems to remain somewhat calm
despite being the target of T.M. Opera O's
games.

text_block_list.name: Skillful Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Success seems to have gone to your head, T.M.
Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Skillful Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, today won't be so easy. We've got our
eyes set only on you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, the race is about to begin. To battle,
Doto.
choice_data_list: Mind your surroundings, T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Surroundings? How do you mean, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? The other racers are all looking this way.
Their gazes are sharp and fiercely intense.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Huh... Well, that is only natural.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Cinderella's evil stepsisters are beyond jealous of
her!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Be on your guard, Doto.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O doesn't realize those glares are aimed at
herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Who will win—the king, the princess, or the angry
nobility? An intriguing drama is about to unfold.
